message:
feat(io): Add AsyncRead trait and extensions [asupersync-o8o] Implements async I/O infrastructure: - ReadBuf for safe buffer management - AsyncRead trait with poll_read - Chain and Take adapters - AsyncReadExt with read_exact, read_to_end, read_to_string, read_u8 - Implementations for &[u8], Cursor, Box, &mut R, Pin

- Comprehensive test coverage (9 tests) Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5
